5. call_llm()

- To avoid the obstacle, Spot needs to rotate 90 degrees to the left to face -y.

- Spot moves 1.0 meter forward along the new heading.
- Since Spot is now on the other side of the obstacle, it needs to call the LLM to get a new plan to reach the target.
